arts.ttl: Going to the game?: Arsenal v Palace matchday guide
arts.sum: Crystal Palace will be looking to take their excellent league form into the Carabao Cup for a quarter-final trip across London to face Arsenal on Wednesday, 18th December (KO: 19:30 GMT).

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal join race to sign teenage duo shining in Europa League, one is already a full international
Brighton table €25m bid for Arsenal target – Club warn Seagulls much higher offer needed for signing
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion have joined Arsenal and other clubs in the chase for Palmeiras’ Vitor Reis, according to ESPN in Brazil. On Thursday, Nosso Palestra stated Arsenal have made contact to and are expected to make an offer in the coming weeks for the defender. A day later, Goal in Brazil backed up Arsenal The post Brighton table €25m bid for Arsenal target – Club warn Seagulls much higher offer needed for signing appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to address biggest problem with January transfer as £45m 'decision' made
arts.sum: football.london says: Arsenal need a new attacker in January so looking towards Pedro makes a lot of sense. Pedro has scored four league goals this season from 10 matches, assisting three, and is a versatile option able to play across the frontline.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace risk losing as many as eight players in 2025
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have a number of players out of contract next summer, and that could see as many as eight leave either in January or at the end of the season. Unbeaten in the last five games, including draws against high-flying Man City and Aston Villa, Oliver Glasner‘s side look to have finally turned the […] The post Crystal Palace risk losing as many as eight players in 2025 appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd find Garnacho suitor; Liverpool & Arsenal compete for Kudus
arts.sum: The latest transfer news, rumours and gossip circulating around the world.

arts.ttl: Arsenal flop refuses to be offloaded in January
arts.sum: There have been growing reports in recent weeks that Sterling ’s struggles at the Emirates could lead to Arsenal cutting short his loan spell in the January transfer. Raheem Sterling is refusing to give up on his Arsenal career and will reject any move away from the club in January.

arts.ttl: 'Excellent' 19-year-old Arsenal youngster could be included in senior squad to play Crystal Palace tomorrow
arts.sum: Arsenal will certainly face a stern test when Crystal Palace arrive at the Emirates Stadium for a quarter-final EFL Cup tie on Wednesday. So far...

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry delivers damning assessment of Arsenal's 'predictable' attack as the Gunners legend singles out one struggling star for criticism
arts.sum: Arsenal spent the last two seasons pushing Manchester City right to the end in their bid for a first Premier League title since 2003-04, but fell just short, and look set to miss out again this term.
